name: Hepatic Incidentaloma
description: Report template for incidental hepatic lesions identified on imaging performed for other indications

findings.technique: CT [abdomen/chest/CTA] performed for [other clinical indication]. Liver windowing reviewed.
findings.comparison: No prior liver imaging available for comparison. [Prior imaging from X date reviewed] - [lesion is new/stable/interval change].

sections.name: Hepatic Lesion
sections.content: Incidental hepatic [lesion/mass/nodule] identified in [right/left] lobe. Size: [X]cm. Location: [segment X]. [Solitary / Multiple - number: X] lesions.

sections.name: Characterization
sections.content: Attenuation: [X]HU (pre-contrast). Arterial phase: [no enhancement / peripheral rim enhancement / central enhancement / hyperenhancement]. Portal venous phase: [isodense to liver / hypodense / washout]. Delayed phase: [hypodense / persistent enhancement].

sections.name: Morphology
sections.content: Margin: [well-defined / irregular / infiltrative]. Capsular enhancement: [present/absent]. Internal characteristics: [homogeneous / heterogeneous / cystic / necrotic / calcifications].

sections.name: Background Liver
sections.content: Liver parenchyma: [normal / fatty infiltration / cirrhosis / heterogeneous]. Liver size: [normal / enlarged / small]. [Portal hypertension: present/absent]. Spleen: [normal / enlarged].

sections.name: Additional Findings
sections.content: Additional hepatic lesions: [present/absent]. [Biliary dilation: present/absent]. [Lymphadenopathy: present/absent]. [Extrahepatic metastasis: present/absent].

impression:
1. Incidental hepatic [lesion/mass] in [right/left] lobe measuring [X]cm
2. [LI-RADS category: LR-X / Not applicable - lesions less likely to be HCC in non-cirrhotic liver]
3. [Imaging characteristics most consistent with: hemangioma / focal nodular hyperplasia / hepatic adenoma / metastatic disease / HCC / indeterminate]
4. [Follow-up in X months / MRI with gadoxetate / Biopsy / Surgical consultation] recommended
5. Underlying liver: [normal / steatosis / cirrhosis]
author: RadReport Templates
